title: Photo Detail View and Modal System
description: Build photo detail view for viewing individual photos with full information. Create modal system for photo viewing from feed without navigation. Display full-size photo with zoom capability. Show complete photo metadata (EXIF data, upload date, camera info). Display AI analysis results (tags, feedback, captions). Show engagement section (likes, comments). Add sharing functionality (copy link, social share buttons). Implement keyboard navigation (arrow keys for next/previous, escape to close). Add photo actions for owner (edit, delete). Support deep linking to individual photos.
